narrative:
Monroe Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 904 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
